en.title: For Starlink mini Magnetic Mount, for Starlink Mini Dish
en.description_html:
The Starlink Mini Mount for Car Roof features 4 powerful magnetic feet and a rugged aluminum alloy frame, providing a secure and weatherproof solution for seamless connectivity on the go. Stay connected, entertained, and productive wherever your travel takes you.

Features:

  • Seamless Connectivity On the Go - Starlink Mini Car Roof Mount with 4 magnetic feet holds your dish on the car roof, transforming your car into a mobile hotspot. Enjoy uninterrupted, high-speed internet access wherever your adventures take you

  • Unwavering Magnetic Hold - Experience rock-solid stability even on the bumpy roads. This mount features powerful magnets with up to 220 Lbs of pull force that securely grip your car's roof, ensuring your Starlink Mini stays firmly in place

  • Full Coverage Ultimate Protection - Constructed by sturdy aluminum alloy frame and rugged PC panel, this mount is designed to withstand rain, hail, and other harsh outdoor elements, keeping your Starlink Mini safe and secure

  • Versatile Usages - Use the powerful magnetic base for quick and easy attachment on the car roof, or combine its aluminum bracket with roof mount pivot (sold separately) when installing on your house roof

  • Stay Connected, Stay Productive - Whether you're working remotely, streaming movies, or navigating unfamiliar terrain, this Starlink Mini car roof mount ensures you always have reliable internet access at your fingertips

Specifications:

  • Overall Dimension(LxWxH): 12 11/16" x 11 3/16" x 2 1/16" (32.3 x 28.4 x 5.2 cm)

  • Bracket Dimension(LxWxH): 12 11/16" x 11 1/8" x 1 9/16" (32.3 x 28.3 x 3.9 cm)

  • Panel Size(LxW): 12 11/16" x 11 3/16" (32.3 x 28.4 cm)

  • Material: Aluminum Alloy

  • Net Weight: 3.3 Lbs (1.5 kg)

Package Includes:

  • 1x Bracket

  • 1x Panel

  • 4x Magnetic Feet

  • 1 Set of Screws

  • 1x Allen Key

  • 1x Wrench

  • 1x Manual

  • Package Content:

  • 1x Magnetic LED Tube Light

  • 2x Straps
